rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (2/10) and rest on the same job-relevant grounds: missing 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ experience, no Capital Markets/Fixed Income domain expertise, and no demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle experience. The differences are ordinary rewording within run-to-run noise.
